title: VEN'S ATELIER
description: Personal portfolio website to showcase my skills and projects. p.s. You're accessing it right now!

title: KAIRO
description: AI-powered Personal Knowledge Management (PKM) desktop application to upload study materials, generate summaries, knowledge graphs, flashcards and quizzes. Built in AI assistant to guide users on their study materials. Adapts to user's topic mastery level and proficiency to provide targeted learning routes. Multi-language support.

title: PRESSED.
description: Modern e-commerce vinyl store for collectors alike. Browse catalog, save to collection, rate, and purchase vinyl records through Stripe and view real-time order tracking. Admin dashboard to manage inventory through Discogs API, track orders and revenue statistics.

title: ESSENCE
description: AI assistant that provides contextual and factual information with citations. Responses are tailored based on user's custom preferences and instructions. Supports wide range of languages, e.g. Japanese, Korean, French, etc. Currently under occasional polishing.

title: SOLAR SYSTEM 3D
description: Interactive 3D visualisation of the solar system, featuring real orbital mechanics based on Kepler's equations.

title: STUDENT FEEDBACK & SUGGESTION SYSTEM
description: AI-powered feedback and suggestion system for UMSKAL students with sentiment analysis.

title: BLACK HOLE RAY-TRACING SIMULATION
description: Visualises gravitational lensing, accretion disk, and spacetime curvature using ray-tracing techniques.

title: PLUSHLY
description: Mobile-first e-commerce platform for plush toys. Allows customers to design custom plushies with Stripe purchases.

title: NOWHERE
description: Web-based game for players to guess real-world locations using Google Maps and Street View imagery.

title: FERRY TERMINAL MANAGEMENT
description: Console-based ferry terminal system for managing ferry operations with data structure and algorithms.

title: SNACK ATLAS
description: E-commerce snack shop for customers to browse and purchase snacks with order tracking.

title: PROGRESS PACER
description: Group project - Academic management tool for students to track academic performance with personalised feedback.

title: LIMBO
description: Personal website for showcsing interactive 3D environments with user-controlled character.

title: ONLINE GROCERY SYSTEM
description: GUI-based grocery system for purchasing goods with checkout and grocery receipt as order confimation.

title: ESPRESSO EMPORIUM
description: French language themed café website with an emphasis on frontend design and user-centricity.

title: FOOD ODYSSEY
description: Foundation level FYP project showcasing various culinary delights globally, with 360° interactive environment view.
